student_input: I got 450/1100 in Matric, 400/1100 in FSc, and 30/200 in MDCAT. Can I get admission in King Edward Medical University?

state.student_input: I got 450/1100 in Matric, 400/1100 in FSc, and 30/200 in MDCAT. Can I get admission in King Edward Medical University?
state.advice: Although your current merit score of 26.14% falls short of the eligibility criteria, don't be discouraged. Focus on improving your overall profile, particularly in areas like the MDCAT, where a higher score can significantly impact your merit score due to its 0.5 weightage in the formula. For instance, increasing your MDCAT score from 30 to 100 could potentially raise your merit score substantially. Consider retaking the MDCAT and preparing thoroughly to achieve a higher score. Additionally, ensure you meet all other eligibility requirements. With persistence and the right strategy, you can work towards improving your merit score and enhancing your chances of admission to a prestigious institution like King Edward Medical University.
